merge_goal: Combine support answering and escalation behavior into one coherent skill without weakening safety policy.
key_constraints: Simple requests should receive immediate direct answers.
Sensitive or policy-bound requests must require escalation.
Merged output authority must remain deterministic and explicit.
known_conflicts: PolicyAnswerSkill requires explicit escalation before any answer on policy-sensitive topics.
AutoReplySkill permits best-effort direct answers with a warning banner for the same topic family.
The two source skills disagree on who owns the escalate-versus-answer decision.
